videos.title: UK | 01st May, Monday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 01st May, Monday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: Hindi | 01st May, Monday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 01st May, Monday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

videos.title: Who Wins The Stanley Cup? | Morning Cuppa Hockey
videos.summary_source_text:
Who Wins The Stanley Cup? | Morning Cuppa Hockey Season 3 rolls on with another loaded edition of Morning Cuppa Hockey as Jonny Lazarus and Colby Cohen get you set for the Stanley Cup Final between the Carolina Hurricanes and Vegas Golden Knights.

The guys open the show by sharing their biggest takeaways from Stanley Cup Final Media Day before breaking down the key storylines and matchups that could decide who lifts the Cup.

Then, Spittin' Chiclets producer Mike Grinnell joins the show to give his Stanley Cup prediction, discuss where the biggest advantage lies for each team. He also shares his thoughts on the Bruins' offseason outlook and the NCAA's potential five-year eligibility rule.

Later, former NHL video coach Steve Peters stops by to discuss whether Vegas can crack Carolina's system, the impact of John Tortorella behind the Golden Knights bench, and some under-the-radar players who could make a difference in the Final.

To close out the show, Arizona State assistant coach Jimmy Mullen joins discuss' his journey to ASU, the future of the Sun Devils program, and what lies ahead for the 2026-27 season.

Don't forget to subscribe, like, and turn on notifications so you never miss an episode of Morning Cuppa Hockey.

videos.title: HEAVYWEIGHT BOUT? Stanley Cup Final Crossover as the Carolina Hurricanes Seek to Win 2nd Stanley Cup
videos.summary_source_text:
HEAVYWEIGHT BOUT? Stanley Cup Final Crossover as the Carolina Hurricanes Seek to Win 2nd Stanley Cup It's finally here, Game 1 of the Stanley Cup Final. Who will come out on top in the end as the 2026 Stanley Cup Champions? It's a special crossover edition as we discuss all things Stanley Cup Final hockey. On the Stanley Cup Final Crossover Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach joins Chris from Locked On Golden Knights as the guys discuss the big storylines heading into the final round of the 2026 NHL Playoffs. How did both teams get here? Who stepped up along the way? Secondly, the guys discuss key players for both sides throughout the playoffs. Who should fans be watching and which big names will lead the way? What are some potential X-Factors? Finally, the guys conclude with their series predictions and Conn Smythe winners. Who will hoist Lord Stanley and in how many games? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

Hermes Agent OS: The Mission Control Dashboard for AI Agents (10x Better Than Terminals)

The script showcases Hermes Agent OS as a mission control center for managing and automating AI agents with a unified, visual dashboard. It contrasts the typical terminal-based Hermes workflow—hard to control, organize, and preview past work—with an Agentic OS interface that lets users preview creations, manage tools and skills, connect MCPs in one click, track agent status, and use a Kanban board to assign missions to teams of agents. The system supports building apps and agency tools, generating and previewing videos via built-in skills, and operating connected assets like NotebookLM, while maintaining persistent history and a local memory/knowledge-graph layer synced with an Obsidian vault. It emphasizes avoiding scattered tabs and context re-explaining, and highlights the system’s ability to evolve by quickly adding new models and workflows.

videos.title: Why Backwards Skating is a Hockey Skill
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Backwards Skating is a Hockey Skill The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

videos.title: I Tested PewDiePie's Odysseus AI (Free!)
videos.summary_source_text:
I Tested PewDiePie's Odysseus AI (Free!) 👑 Premium Community: https://mrc.fm/premium
⛵️ Try Odysseus: https://mrc.fm/odysseus

In this one I'm getting hands-on with Odysseus. The self hosted AI workspace that PewDiePie quietly built and open sourced. I'm putting it through its paces on my Mac Studio. I'll take it from a clean install all the way through to the features that actually matter... pointing it at local models, letting the Cookbook scan my hardware and tell me what it can run, then working through chat, autonomous agents, deep research, the blind model comparison tool, and the persistent memory that's meant to learn how I work. The whole pitch is a private, local first alternative to ChatGPT and Claude with no cloud, no subscription, and no data leaving the machine. So the real question I'm answering is whether something built on a ten GPU monster holds up on Apple Silicon, and whether it's genuinely useful day to day or just a brilliant weekend project.

0:00 Introduction to Odysseus by PewDiePie
1:20 Exploring the Landing Page & GitHub Repo
2:40 Beginning Native macOS Installation

In this one I'm getting hands-on with Odysseus. The self hosted AI workspace that PewDiePie quietly built and open sourced. I'm putting it through its paces on my Mac Studio. I'll take it from a clean install all the way through to the features that actually matter... pointing it at local models, letting the Cookbook scan my hardware and tell me what it can run, then working through chat, autonomous agents, deep research, the blind model comparison tool, and the persistent memory that's meant to learn how I work. The whole pitch is a private, local first alternative to ChatGPT and Claude with no cloud, no subscription, and no data leaving the machine. So the real question I'm answering is whether something built on a ten GPU monster holds up on Apple Silicon, and whether it's genuinely useful day to day or just a brilliant weekend project.

videos.title: Is Jack Eichel About to be a 2x Cup Champ?
videos.summary_source_text:
Is Jack Eichel About to be a 2x Cup Champ? Is Jack Eichel about to become a two time cup champion? He is one of the most dangerous players on the rush but what makes him special isn’t just speed.

It’s his ability to be both wide and dynamic which is a rare combination that allows him to move laterally, attack the middle, and beat defenders without losing stride efficiency.

If your looking to dominate the game more like Jack you can these two key patterns:

The Corkscrew - controlling your wide stance while staying reactive.

Edge Dragging- learning to pull the ice instead of pushing, giving you that deceptive, flowing lateral power.

By mastering these two mechanics, you’ll unlock the same movement principles Eichel uses to dominate off the rush and you’ll move smoother, faster, and more unpredictably than ever.

Check out our website to make your skating and attacking more Eichel like. Is Jack Eichel about to become a two time cup champion? He is one of the most dangerous players on the rush but what makes him special isn’t just speed.

videos.title: Stanley Cup Final Preview, Memorial Cup Recap & Proposed NHL Rule Changes | DFO Rundown
videos.summary_source_text:
Stanley Cup Final Preview, Memorial Cup Recap & Proposed NHL Rule Changes | DFO Rundown Jeff Marek and Jason Gregor break down some of the biggest proposed NHL rule changes and debate whether the league should make significant adjustments to the game.

From contract length limits and 3-on-3 overtime changes to embellishment penalties, referee accountability, neutral-zone faceoffs, penalty-kill rules, and NHL rink size, the guys discuss which ideas could improve the league and which should stay on the drawing board.

6 Changes I’d Make if I Were NHL Commissioner - Jason Gregor
https://oilersnation.com/news/nhl-rule-changes-commissioner-blueprint

They also preview the 2026 Stanley Cup Final, examining the key matchups, biggest storylines, X-factors, coaching battles, and players who could determine who lifts the Stanley Cup.

Can Carolina's depth and structure overcome Vegas' playoff experience and star power? Marek and Gregor break it all down ahead of Game 1.

Plus a look back at the career and legacy of Claude Lemieux and a full Memorial Cup recap, including more praise for Sam O’Reilly, who capped off a monster season after winning OHL MVP and Memorial Cup MVP.

videos.title: If Your Irons Don’t Feel Solid, Start Here
videos.summary_source_text:
If Your Irons Don’t Feel Solid, Start Here ⛳️ Take Your FREE Game Assessment → https://meandmygolf.com/game-plan/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=01.06.26

📱 Download the Swing Coach App (2-Week Free Trial) → https://go.meandmygolf.com/swingcoach/yt/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=01.06.26

If your irons don’t feel solid, this lesson will show you one of the most common reasons why.
In this quick golf lesson, we work with Ally to improve her iron contact using a simple drill that looks unusual at first, but helps expose what’s really causing poor strikes. If you struggle to find the middle of the club-face, hit weak iron shots, or get inconsistent contact, this will help you understand what may be happening in your swing.

We cover two common faults that affect iron strike:
- moving towards the golf ball through impact
- getting the hands too far forward

Then we show a simple way to train a better movement so you can start striking your irons more solidly.
If you’ve ever felt like your iron strikes can disappear from one round to the next, this is a great place to start.

Let us know in the comments: do you tend to miss the middle more from the heel or the toe?

videos.title: Billigaste bilen kostar minst 5 000 kr i månaden (2026)
videos.summary_source_text:
Billigaste bilen kostar minst 5 000 kr i månaden (2026) Erik Naessén sa i vår community att även den billigaste bilen kostar minst 5 000 kronor i månaden. Jag höll inte med först, man tänker ju mest på drivmedlet. Men räknar man allt stämmer det.

Försäkring, parkering, brobizz, trängselavgift, torkare och biltvätt är bara början. De stora bitarna är skatt, ränta, alternativkostnad och framför allt värdeminskning. En ny bil tappar ungefär hälften av värdet på tre år. Vår Tesla kostade ungefär 13 000 kronor i månaden bara i värdeminskning. Bilen är de flestas näst största utgift, och där finns mycket att tjäna.

Vill du räkna på din egen bil hittar du bilkalkylen via den fästa kommentaren. Mer om bilekonomi finns på rikatillsammans.se och i RikaTillsammans-podden. 1/3 cup (50 g) unsweetened dried cranberries. Soak the cranberries in hot water for about 15 minutes.
1/4 cup (60 ml) coconut oil.
1/4 cup (50 g) shredded coconut. 1 tbsp stevia powder.
1/3 cup (50 g) unsweetened cocoa powder.
Leave in the freezer for about 2 hours.
1 pear.
Almonds.

videos.summary_source_text:
Do This in Bed Before Sleeping Tonight. Fall Asleep Faster and Wake Up Refreshed | Dr. Mandell What if one simple bedtime routine could help calm your nervous system, improve circulation, reduce swelling in your legs and feet, and prepare your body for deeper, more restful sleep? In this video, Dr. Mandell shares a powerful relaxation technique that combines leg elevation, gentle foot and ankle movements, rhythmic tapping, and nervous system calming strategies designed to help your body transition into a relaxed state before sleep. By elevating your feet above your heart, you can support healthy circulation, encourage lymphatic flow, reduce fluid buildup, and help activate the body's natural relaxation response. The gentle movements and rhythmic tapping techniques may help quiet a busy mind, ease tension, and shift your body into a more restful state, making it easier to fall asleep and wake up feeling refreshed. Try this simple nighttime routine for a few minutes before bed and experience the difference for yourself. Let us know in the comments how you slept after trying it.

videos.title: Gemini 3.5 Flash: 1 Million Tokens, 4x Faster, Genuinely Smart?
videos.summary_source_text:
Gemini 3.5 Flash: 1 Million Tokens, 4x Faster, Genuinely Smart? Try Flova AI: https://www.flova.ai/?refCode=L93WA3F9

Google quietly shipped Gemini 3.5 Flash — a "fast tier" model that 
matches frontier-quality reasoning at 4x the speed. In this deep dive, 
I break down what it actually does, how to prompt it without wasting 
money, where it falls short, and exactly how it compares to GPT-4o, 
Claude, and Llama 3.

🔍 What we cover:
- The 1M-token context window and full multimodal input (text, images, 
  audio, video, PDF — in one API call)
- Pricing breakdown: why output tokens cost 6x more than input
- The built-in agent tools (Google Search grounding, code execution, 
  File Search for private docs)
- The prompting rules that go AGAINST what works in GPT and Claude 
  (yes, leave the temperature at 1.0)
- Three real demos: legal contract summary, sales chart analysis, 
  and the File Search trick that replaces RAG for most use cases
- Honest limits: hallucinations, no long-term memory, text-output-only
- Full head-to-head: Gemini vs GPT-4o vs Claude vs Llama 3

If you've been mixing AI models for different tasks, this video will 
help you figure out exactly when Gemini 3.5 Flash is the right call — 
and when it absolutely isn't.

🔗 Full privacy checklist: 
Gemini 3.5 Privacy Checklist
✅ Never paste API keys, passwords, or secrets into prompts.
✅ Avoid sharing personal information (emails, phone numbers, addresses, IDs).
✅ Remove confidential business data before uploading documents.
✅ Enable Gemini API content filters in the Google AI Studio/API console.
✅ Review data retention settings before deploying to production.
✅ Check whether your plan allows opting out of model training.
✅ Use customer-managed encryption keys (CMEK) when available.
✅ Use private network endpoints for sensitive enterprise workloads.
✅ Select the correct regional data residency option for compliance needs.
✅ Restrict access to AI tools using role-based permissions.
✅ Log and audit AI usage in your organization.
✅ Review generated outputs for accidental data leakage.
✅ Follow local regulations (GDPR, HIPAA, etc.) where applicable.
✅ Avoid sending regulated, classified, or highly sensitive information unless enterprise safeguards are enabled.
✅ Treat every AI prompt as data being processed on external cloud infrastructure.

Rule of thumb: If you wouldn't post it in a company-wide email, think twice before putting it into an AI prompt.

videos.title: Stanley Cup Final Preview: Canes vs Golden Knights ft. Pierre McGuire | The Sheet with Jeff Marek
videos.summary_source_text:
Stanley Cup Final Preview: Canes vs Golden Knights ft. Pierre McGuire | The Sheet with Jeff Marek The Stanley Cup Final is here. On today’s episode of The Sheet with Jeff Marek, Jeff is joined by Pierre McGuire to break down the highly anticipated 2026 Stanley Cup Final between the Vegas Golden Knights and the Carolina Hurricanes, with Game 1 set to begin tomorrow night in Raleigh. Jeff and Pierre dive deep into the key storylines heading into the championship series, including the battle between Rod Brind’Amour and John Tortorella, the goaltending matchup featuring Frederik Andersen and Carter Hart, the impact of stars like Jack Eichel, Mitch Marner, Sebastian Aho, Seth Jarvis, and Andrei Svechnikov, and which team holds the edge as they chase hockey’s ultimate prize. They also discuss Carolina’s dominant playoff run, Vegas’ impressive sweep of the Colorado Avalanche, the biggest X-factors that could decide the series, and what each team must do to lift the Stanley Cup. Plus, Jeff and Pierre take a tour around the NHL and break down the latest news, notes, rumours, coaching developments, and offseason storylines from across the league as another busy week unfolds. Don’t miss this full Stanley Cup Final preview and NHL roundup on The Sheet.

videos.title: How Bo Nix becomes a top 5 quarterback with the Denver Broncos as Sean Payton predicted
videos.summary_source_text:
How Bo Nix becomes a top 5 quarterback with the Denver Broncos as Sean Payton predicted Can Bo Nix become a top 5 quarterback for the Denver Broncos? Sean Payton believes the young QB has that kind of upside, and we’re breaking down exactly what it would take for Bo Nix to reach elite status in Denver.

On today’s DNVR Broncos Podcast, we dive into Bo Nix’s development, Sean Payton’s offensive vision, the Broncos’ 2026 expectations, and how the Denver Broncos can build around its franchise quarterback. From decision-making and accuracy to playmakers, protection, and Payton’s play-calling, we examine the biggest factors that could determine whether Nix makes the leap into the NFL’s top tier.

Is Bo Nix ready to lead the Denver Broncos back into AFC contention? Can Sean Payton unlock a top 5 quarterback? And what does this mean for Broncos Country heading into the 2026 NFL season?

On the DNVR Broncos Podcast, Super Bowl 50 champion Bennie Fowler, Zac Stevens, Ryan Koenigsberg and Henry Chisholm are coming to you LIVE from the DNVR Bar to break down all of the latest news in Broncos Country.

A distinguished former Hot Ones guest, as well. He also has a brand new collaborative album, Omerta, alongside Ryan Castro. But how is he with spicy food? Find out as he takes on the wings of death for a second time while discussing being a life long fan of Metallica, his 90s Volkswagen Hatchback Rayo, and gives a travel guide to his hometown of Medellin, Colombia. Stick around for a bonus scene with his bff Andres, who is back for an encore performance against Da Bomb.

Watch as I share some tips on how to master this area of the game, all while playing with my son, Charlie!

videos.title: Flying Through the Playoffs... Then Waiting 😅
videos.summary_source_text:
Flying Through the Playoffs... Then Waiting 😅 Jordan Martinook catches up with Stanley Cup Live on Media Day to discuss the Carolina Hurricanes' rapid path through the first two rounds of the Stanley Cup Playoffs and the 12-day break that followed. Martinook shares how the layoff felt almost like an end-of-season break and weighs the pros and cons of rest versus rust ahead of the Eastern Conference Final.

videos.title: Stanley Cup Final Preview + Kings Offseason Preview | Daily Faceoff Live
videos.summary_source_text:
Stanley Cup Final Preview + Kings Offseason Preview | Daily Faceoff Live Welcome to Daily Faceoff Live!

The Carolina Hurricanes are heading to the Stanley Cup Final after an incredible playoff run, steamrolling their way through the Eastern Conference with dominant underlying numbers and a remarkable 12-1 postseason record. We discuss what has made Rod Brind'Amour's group so effective and whether anyone can slow them down.

We also look at the Montreal Canadiens after their surprising run to the Eastern Conference Final came to an end. With Brendan Gallagher's emotional comments raising questions about his future and major offseason decisions looming, what comes next for Kent Hughes and the Canadiens?

Plus, it's another edition of our Offseason Preview series as we focus on the Los Angeles Kings. With Anze Kopitar's retirement ushering in a new era, a head coaching vacancy to fill, and significant cap space available, what should priority number one be for the Kings this summer?

Steven Peters joins the show for The Film Room to break down Carolina's dominant playoff formula, analyze the matchup against Vegas, and discuss the biggest tactical storylines heading into the Stanley Cup Final.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

X: https://twitter.com/RickShielsPGA
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rickshielspga/
Website: http://www.rickshiels.com/

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par.

Are Takomo Fairway Woods worth it 🤔 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

A long, slow breath out helps stimulate the vagus nerve, shifting the body away from stress and toward a calmer, more restorative state. Every slow exhale is an opportunity to strengthen the body's natural calming system.

videos.summary_source_text:
Cup Final Set: Hurricanes & Golden Knights | Morning Cuppa Hockey Season 3 rolls on with another packed edition of Morning Cuppa Hockey as Jonny Lazarus and Colby Cohen get you set for the biggest stage in hockey. 

First, NHL insider David Pagnotta joins the show to break down the latest trade rumours and offseason speculation from around the league, including which teams could be the most active this summer and the biggest storylines to watch as the Stanley Cup Final approaches. 

Then, former NHL defenseman Aaron Ward stops by to provide a full breakdown of the Carolina Hurricanes' impressive run to the Stanley Cup Final, examining what has made Rod Brind'Amour's club so successful, the key performances that have fueled their playoff push, and what they'll need to do to capture hockey's ultimate prize. 

Plus, Jonny and Colby share their thoughts on the latest NHL news, playoff storylines, and everything surrounding Game 1 of the Stanley Cup Final.

videos.title: DECISIVE Final 9 Holes in Austria | 2026 Austria Alpine Open presented by Kitzbühel Tirol
videos.summary_source_text:
DECISIVE Final 9 Holes in Austria | 2026 Austria Alpine Open presented by Kitzbühel Tirol Watch the drama unfold in the Back 9 on Sunday, presented by Nexo as Kota Kaneko claimed his maiden DP World Tour victory. Kaneko held firm throughout the weekend to secure a two-shot win, becoming the ninth first-time winner on the DP World Tour this season.

The victory propels Kaneko to a career-high 101st in the Official World Golf Ranking and makes him the first Japanese player to win Austria’s national open.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The European Swing continues this week as the DP World Tour heads to a new venue for the Austrian Alpine Open presented by Kitzbühel Tirol. Ryder Cup hero Sepp Straka will tee it up on home soil for the first time since 2018, leading a host of Austrian stars looking to delight the home fans. Since that appearance at the Shot Clock Masters, Straka has gone on to become the first Austrian to win on the PGA TOUR, taking his tally of wins on that circuit to four and twice win the Ryder Cup but he is searching for a maiden DP World Tour title. This week we head to a third first-time host in five events as Golfclub Kitzbühel-Schwarzsee-Reith becomes the 465th venue to stage a DP World Tour event. Joining the field this week are players like Casey Jarvis, Kipp Popert and reigning champion Nicolai von Dellingshausen.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

videos.title: You’re giving up your best rounds… 👀
videos.summary_source_text:
You’re giving up your best rounds… 👀 Look, this isn’t about telling you to buy a new driver - if anything, we’re telling you you shouldn’t!

Here’s the simple truth ⬇️

The 1-3-5 rule for drivers:

👉🏽 1 year old: you’re fine.
👉🏽 3 years old: performance is slipping
👉🏽 5+ years old: you’re losing ball speed, consistency, and fairways.

Why it matters:

❎ Ball speed → every 1 mph = ~2–3 yards. New faces keep that speed alive, even on mishits.

❎ Consistency → tighter spin + launch means more playable drives.

❎ Forgiveness → higher MOI heads keep you in the short grass.

❎ Distance → 10–20 yards lost with older drivers is common. That’s a full club into every approach.

This isn’t about chasing the “latest release.”

It’s about not giving strokes away because your driver tech is a decade behind. Look, this isn’t about telling you to buy a new driver - if anything, we’re telling you you shouldn’t!

❎ Consistency → tighter spin + launch means more playable drives.

❎ Forgiveness → higher MOI heads keep you in the short grass.

❎ Distance → 10–20 yards lost with older drivers is common. That’s a full club into every approach.

In this video, we break down eye-opening Arccos golf data to reveal why so many amateur golfers are hitting their iron shots short. If you struggle with inconsistent golf iron distance, a flicky forward impact, or scooping the golf ball, these 3 simple golf swing tips will fix your iron compression. We look at the data difference between a scratch golfer and a 25 handicap, fix your trail arm setup, fix your shoulder sway, and stop the excessive hip sway that is killing your golf swing speed. Watch until the end to learn the counterintuitive drill that will finally give you tour-style shaft lean!

videos.title: If You Learn This You'll Play The Best Golf Of Your Life In 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
If You Learn This You'll Play The Best Golf Of Your Life In 2026 In this golf lesson, Eric Cogorno reveals the most overlooked fundamental in the golf swing – hips moving foward during the downswing. Eric Cogorno demonstrates how moving your hips in golf swing forward by 4-6 inches creates two essential benefits: superior low point control for ball-first contact and an inside swing path for straighter shots. Through detailed analysis of PGA Tour Pro swings and practical golf drills, you'll master this non-negotiable movement that transforms inconsistent ball strikers into solid players virtually overnight.

⏱️ 0:00 - The critical hip movement in the golf swing most golfers miss 
🎯 1:01 - Why hips must move 4-6 inches forward in the golf swing
💪 1:29 - Low point control and swing path  
🔍 2:28 - Fixing fat/thin shots and directional issues 
📊 2:52 - PGA Tour Pro examples: Scotty Scheffler, Tommy Fleetwood, Rory McIlroy 
🏌️ 4:49 - Golf drills: Using alignment stick to practice proper hip movement 
🎪 8:18 - Hip rotation with forward movement - checkpoints 
⭐ 10:17 - Proper position of the hips at setup 
🏆 12:14 - Complete swing sequence: setup, backswing, and forward hip drive

What You'll Learn:

• How to use your hips in the golf swing to move 4-6 inches forward for solid contact
• Essential low point control techniques that ensure ball-first, ground-second impact
• Golf drills using alignment sticks to practice proper hip movement in the golf swing
• PGA Tour Pro hip movement patterns from Scotty Scheffler, Tommy Fleetwood, and Rory McIlroy
• Two proven feelings for initiating forward hip drive during your golf swing
• Proper setup positions that make forward hip movement easier and more natural

videos.title: Are Ferrari favourites? | Monaco GP Preview | F1 Nation Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Are Ferrari favourites? | Monaco GP Preview | F1 Nation Podcast Tom Clarkson is joined by former F1 driver Jolyon Palmer and IndyCar race winner James Hinchcliffe to look ahead to this weekend’s Monaco Grand Prix.

After Canada, Lewis Hamilton said he thinks Ferrari will be strong in Monaco. So, could this be the first Grand Prix of 2026 that Mercedes don’t win? Are Ferrari the favourites in Monte Carlo?

Jolyon, Hinch and Tom discuss the Scuderia’s chances and what mindset Charles Leclerc is in before his home race, after describing Canada as the ‘most difficult weekend of my Formula 1 career’.

With Kimi Antonelli looking for a fifth win in a row to extend his 43-point championship lead, where has he made a step forward in 2026? And do we need to rethink how we view George Russell’s performances against his Mercedes teammate?

The guys also react to the announcement that Gucci will become Alpine’s title sponsor in 2027. And we look back in the archives to commemorate Jolyon’s first F1 race in Monaco 10 years ago.

videos.title: Kia EV5: Here’s why I WOULDN’T buy it
videos.summary_source_text:
Kia EV5: Here’s why I WOULDN’T buy it This is our in-depth review of the all-new Kia EV5. We’ll be testing what it’s like to drive, looking around the interior, the amount of storage, and seeing whether it’s a better option than the Kia EV3.

Get 20% off Car Vertical using code Carwow: https://bit.ly/Carwow-Car-Vertical

We’ve got our hands on the all-new Kia EV5, and while it’s a really good car, there’s one thing we need to investigate.

Although it’s bigger, it is extremely similar to the cheaper Kia EV3. So does the new EV5 offer enough to make it the better choice, or should you save some money and choose the EV3 instead? Let’s take a closer look…

In terms of the design, the EV5 looks great from whatever angle you look at it. Up top there are stylish & angular headlights, giving the car a slightly aggressive look from the front. There are elements of black trim across the car to give it a more rugged look, and around the back there are more stylish headlights. The side angle highlights the boxy design (similar to the EV9), and overall it looks great. The good news, also, is that whether you choose the entry-level or the top-of-the-range edition (as we have for this review), all editions look extremely similar. 

On the inside, it’s a bit of a mixed bag. There are soft-touch materials across the top of the dash, and there’s a good amount of storage throughout, but the infotainment and digital dial screens that dominate the dash aren’t the best. They’re a bit dark, and the infotainment system isn’t the best, but Apple CarPlay & Android Auto is available if needed. There’s one big plus point though - physical climate control buttons!! 

All editions of the Kia EV5 come with the same single electric motor, driving the front wheels, that can deliver 217hp. They all also come equipped with an 81kWh battery, which in this GT-Line S trim, is good for a claimed range of 313 miles. The entry-level Air has a claimed range of 329 miles. 

The Kia EV5 starts from £39,345, rising up to £47,145 for the range-topping GT-Line S. However, at the time of writing there’s an average saving of £4,000 for one of these on Carwow. 

The question is, with the EV3 range starting from £33,000, which one should you choose? Stick with Mat to see for yourself!

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-0106

Mat configured his favourite EV5: https://bit.ly/Mats-EV5-Choice-0106

videos.title: JOBS NOT DONE! Carolina Hurricanes' Path to the Stanley Cup Final has them Ready
videos.summary_source_text:
JOBS NOT DONE! Carolina Hurricanes' Path to the Stanley Cup Final has them Ready The Carolina Hurricanes are now four wins away from winning their second Stanley Cup in franchise history. Before Game 1 on Tuesday in Raleigh, what has the journey done to get them ready for this moment? What has stood out through the 13 games as the Hurricanes look to defeat the Vegas Golden Knights? On the Monday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes' journey has been one of showing that this team is ready for what's coming their way in the Stanley Cup Final. While they did sweep two teams and got humbled in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Final, there was a lot to learn throughout the playoffs. Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on the guys who stood out the most through the first three rounds of the playoffs. Between the Junkyard Dog line and Frederik Andersen to the depth, there is a ton to talk about when it comes to the Hurricanes. Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing what he hopes to see in the series as the Hurricanes look to take home their second Stanley Cup. Plus, he gives some news on watch parties at the Lenovo Center while the team is on the road. What could that mean for Games 2 & 4 (also 6 if necessary)? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: I Tested PewDiePie's Odysseus AI (Free!)
videos.summary_source_text:
I Tested PewDiePie's Odysseus AI (Free!) 👑 Premium Community: https://mrc.fm/premium

In this one I'm getting hands-on with Odysseus. The self hosted AI workspace that PewDiePie quietly built and open sourced. I'm putting it through its paces on my Mac Studio. I'll take it from a clean install all the way through to the features that actually matter... pointing it at local models, letting the Cookbook scan my hardware and tell me what it can run, then working through chat, autonomous agents, deep research, the blind model comparison tool, and the persistent memory that's meant to learn how I work. The whole pitch is a private, local first alternative to ChatGPT and Claude with no cloud, no subscription, and no data leaving the machine. So the real question I'm answering is whether something built on a ten GPU monster holds up on Apple Silicon, and whether it's genuinely useful day to day or just a brilliant weekend project. 👑 Premium Community: https://mrc.fm/premium

videos.title: The Avalanche Decision on Jared Bednar Expected Soon. Zakhar Bardakov Season Grade.
videos.summary_source_text:
The Avalanche Decision on Jared Bednar Expected Soon. Zakhar Bardakov Season Grade. Jared Bednar’s future with the Colorado Avalanche hangs in the balance as the franchise awaits a pivotal decision from Joe Sakic and Chris MacFarland. Are leadership changes looming, or will Bednar get one last chance to guide a team led by superstars Nathan MacKinnon and Cale Makar back to Stanley Cup glory? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson weigh the case for and against Bednar, dissecting recent playoff exits, the challenge of keeping a championship window open, and whether a decade behind the bench has left the Avalanche needing a new voice.

The hosts also grade Zakar Bardakov’s season, highlight the Avalanche’s depth concerns, and debate youth development versus the pressure to win now. Plus, a lively segment breaks down a viral Dallas Stars fan post, fueling the rivalry with stats, roster moves, and bold claims about team futures. Can Colorado reclaim dominance in the Central, or do rival fans have the upper hand?

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 4 | Charles Schwab Challenge | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 4 | Charles Schwab Challenge | 2026 Check out the best shots of the day from Round 4 of the 2026 Charles Schwab Challenge, featuring Russell Henley, Eric Cole, Ben Griffin, and Alex Smalley, among others. 

The PGA TOUR returns to historic Colonial Country Club for the 80th edition of the Charles Schwab Challenge, with plenty on the line as players make one final push toward the next Signature Event and the upcoming U.S. Open. The field is loaded with stars and rising names, headlined by Ludvig Åberg, who arrives in Texas after a T4 finish at the PGA Championship and six top-10 finishes in his last seven starts. Defending champion Ben Griffin returns looking to become the first player since Ben Hogan in the 1950s to successfully defend at Colonial. Other notable names in the field include Justin Thomas, Hideki Matsuyama, Rickie Fowler, Keegan Bradley and Gary Woodland, while Alex Smalley looks to continue his red-hot form after a runner-up finish at the PGA Championship. Max Homa is one of the golfers in the field chasing a spot in the U.S. Open at Shinnecock Hills Golf Club in just three weeks' time. Homa needs a victory in one of the next three PGA TOUR events to secure his place in the field. The race for the next Signature Event, the Memorial Tournament presented by Workday, also concludes this week. Players are battling for spots via the Aon Swing 5 and Aon Next 10 standings, with strong finishes at Colonial carrying major FedExCup implications. The iconic par-70 layout at Colonial Country Club continues to reward precision and shot-making following its Gil Hanse-led restoration, while the famed “Horrible Horseshoe” remains one of the toughest stretches on TOUR.

Henley went on to win with a birdie on the first playoff hole.

Max Homa is one of the golfers in the field chasing a spot in the U.S. Open at Shinnecock Hills Golf Club in just three weeks' time. videos.title: The Stanley Cup, Described by NHL Champions 🏆
videos.summary_source_text:
The Stanley Cup, Described by NHL Champions 🏆 What does the Stanley Cup look and feel like to the players lucky enough to hoist it? NHL champions including Jack Eichel, Sam Reinhart, Brandon Montour, Robert Thomas, John Carlson, Patrick Kane and Nathan MacKinnon attempt to put into words what makes hockey’s ultimate prize so unforgettable.

From its incredible weight to the dents and scars earned over more than a century, the Stanley Cup tells the story of the grueling journey and the 16 wins it takes to become a champion.

videos.title: Tour Pro Gets A Wedge Fitting | The Numbers Don't Lie
videos.summary_source_text:
Tour Pro Gets A Wedge Fitting | The Numbers Don't Lie Wedge Fitting A Tour Pro - The Numbers Don't Lie

Skyler Finnell is back as we put a bow on his JumboMax fitting. This upload is all about his wedges and how he makes the transition into the larger heavier grip in the short clubs to match his set.

Skyler had reservations about the wedges and how they play & feel in comparison to the rest of his bag when making a grip change. Would he still be able to release the club how he wanted for each situation if he added the counter balance element?

With John Mazzanoble & Alex Trujillo in town from JumboMax it made sense that we would bring them in and learn from the Tour guys about this part of the bag.

Skyler has a great chipping action so there’s a lot to admire, take note if you’re a fitter as to how John & Alex handle this process and the environment as that’s all part of the process.

Skyler Finnell is back as we put a bow on his JumboMax fitting. This upload is all about his wedges and how he makes the transition into the larger heavier grip in the short clubs to match his set.

Skyler had reservations about the wedges and how they play & feel in comparison to the rest of his bag when making a grip change. Would he still be able to release the club how he wanted for each situation if he added the counter balance element?

With John Mazzanoble & Alex Trujillo in town from JumboMax it made sense that we would bring them in and learn from the Tour guys about this part of the bag.

Skyler has a great chipping action so there’s a lot to admire, take note if you’re a fitter as to how John & Alex handle this process and the environment as that’s all part of the process.

videos.title: GPT-6: Everything We Actually Know (And What's Just Hype)
videos.summary_source_text:
GPT-6: Everything We Actually Know (And What's Just Hype) Two halves of the internet can't agree: is GPT-6 launching any week now, or is it 2027 vaporware? In this breakdown we separate what OpenAI has genuinely signaled from rumor dressed up as a leak — the realistic release window, what GPT-6 will actually do across coding, writing, and research, what it might cost, and how it stacks up against Claude and Gemini. No hype, no doom, just the signal.

We cover the parameter scale rumors, the move to full multimodality (and why Sora 2 is the clue everyone missed), the memory shift Sam Altman keeps hinting at, and the privacy minefield that comes with it. 

Plus the timeline leaks worth ignoring, the one that's actually interesting, pricing tiers based on real GPT-5.5 API numbers, and the Jony Ive hardware wildcard.

⏱️ Chapters below. Drop your most-wanted GPT-6 feature in the comments.
🔔 Subscribe to BitBiased AI for no-hype breakdowns the day the news drops.

00:00 — The GPT-6 contradiction
01:02 — What GPT-6 Actually Is

05:06 — What It'll Actually Be Able To Do
07:19 — How You'll Actually Get It, and What It'll Cost
08:56 — The Rules, the Risks, and the Rivals

videos.title: Put THIS in Your Ear for 30 Seconds. See What Happens.  Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
Put THIS in Your Ear for 30 Seconds. See What Happens.  Dr. Mandell What happens when you gently stimulate a small area of your ear for just 30 seconds? You may be surprised by how quickly your body responds. In this video, Dr. Mandell explores simple ear stimulation techniques that may help support relaxation, calmer breathing, reduced tension, and a healthier stress response. Learn about the fascinating connection between the outer ear, the nervous system, and pathways associated with the vagus nerve. You'll discover easy techniques involving the tragus, gentle ear massage, humming, and breathing exercises that you can try anywhere, anytime. These simple methods may help you feel more relaxed, centered, and in tune with your body. Watch until the end and let us know which technique worked best for you and what changes you noticed. Your nervous system may respond in ways you never expected.

*********************************

Better Chips Start Here  #golfswing #golftips Your lie plays a huge role in how the ball will come off the club when chipping. What looks good or bad at first glance often changes when you get closer and really assess how the ball is sitting. By taking a few extra seconds to read the lie, you can make better decisions about setup and club selection. That small habit leads to more consistent strike and fewer wasted shots around the green.

The #1 MOST Dangerous Fiber in the World! Did you know that some types of fiber may actually harm your gut microbes instead of helping them? In this video, we’re uncovering the truth about refined fiber and why it could be one of the most dangerous forms of fiber for your digestive health.

🌟 Which of the 10 health signals are you missing? Take the 2-minute quiz to discover your #1 Health Lever: https://drbrg.co/4dLwZ7i

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

Most people think all fiber is healthy, but not all fiber works the same way inside your body. Whole foods contain fiber naturally combined with powerful polyphenols that help feed the right gut bacteria. But when fiber is refined and stripped from its natural form, it can act like ultra-processed junk food for your microbiome.

videos.title: Slaget i din ekonomi står inte i mataffären (2026)
videos.summary_source_text:
Slaget i din ekonomi står inte i mataffären (2026) Det finns gott om dåliga ekonomiråd av typen "drick en kaffe mindre om dagen". Men om du gillar kaffe och det gör livet rikare, varför dra in på det? Syftet med pengar är att de ska användas till att göra livet bra.

Det som faktiskt avgör din ekonomi är de stora utgifterna: bostadskostnaden, bolåneräntan (som är värd att förhandla), bilen (5–10 000 kronor i månaden för de flesta) och pensionen. Vinn de stora spelen, så spelar de små valen i mataffären mindre roll.

Mer om bolån, bil och pension finns på [rikatillsammans.se](http://rikatillsammans.se) och i RikaTillsammans-podden. Länk till bolåneguiden finns i den fästa kommentaren.

Making consistent AI anime has been brutal — your character changes face every scene, her hair shifts color, the outfit forgets what fabric is, and the whole art style drifts halfway through. In this full Flova AI tutorial I walk you through the exact start-to-finish workflow to build a coherent anime sequence with a character who actually stays the same person across every single shot.

You'll learn how to lock character consistency with Flova's Ingredients system — feeding it multiple reference angles so the camera can orbit a full 360° with zero drift — then kill style drift for good using the Skills feature, generate and direct an entire storyboard from a single concept, route Kling 2.6 for proper anime motion while swapping in Veo 3.1 for cinematic establishing shots, and finish it off with ElevenLabs voices and Suno music before exporting to MP4, ProRes, Premiere Pro, or CapCut. Once your foundation is set, the whole thing comes together in under an hour.

This is the repeatable workflow that takes you from one throwaway clip to building an actual anime series — your character and your style stay saved, so every new episode loads in one click.

videos.title: Do These 5 Exercises Every Day Before It’s Too Late
videos.summary_source_text:
Do These 5 Exercises Every Day Before It’s Too Late If you wake up with stiff hips, a tight lower back, or that locked-up feeling that makes you move older than you actually are, this video is for you. In this five minute bodyweight mobility routine, I'm going to show you five exercises you can do anywhere, with no equipment, to start restoring the hip and lower back motion you lose when you sit too much, train too hard, sleep in the wrong positions, or simply ignore your mobility for too long.

Science based training by Jeff Cavaliere here - https://athleanx.com
Subscribe to This Channel Here - http://bit.ly/2b0coMW

The big problem is that hip stiffness is not something you want to wait on. When you start losing hip internal rotation and hip flexion, you are not just dealing with a minor tightness issue anymore. These are motions that tend to disappear as the hip starts to degenerate. The goal is to get ahead of it while it is still a mobility problem, before it turns into a structural problem that becomes much harder to reverse.

The first exercise targets hip internal rotation. This is one of the most commonly lost motions in the hip and one that most people never train directly. From a deep hip flexed position on the floor, rotate the knees side to side and use your arm to gently drive the hip further into internal rotation. You only need five reps each side, but the key is to be intentional. You are trying to reclaim motion your body may have been losing for years.

From there, use the same setup to work on hip external rotation. As you rotate, use the inside elbow to push the hip further back into external rotation. Internal and external rotation both matter if you want hips that move freely, squat deeper, lunge better, and stop dumping stress into the low back every time you move.

The second exercise targets the quadratus lumborum, or QL, a muscle on the side of the lower back that can get incredibly tight, especially after sleeping in the same position for hours. By sliding one leg back and dropping the hip toward the floor, you create a dynamic stretch through the side of the low back. If you wake up stiff on one side, this one is going to feel like it was made for you.

The third exercise is the squat reach. Done from a deep squat position, it combines hip mobility with thoracic spine rotation. Post your arm against the inside of your leg, rotate your chest open, and reach as high as you can. This opens up the mid back. When the thoracic spine stops rotating and extending, the low back is often forced to pick up the slack.

The fourth exercise combines a deep squat, thoracic extension, and a dynamic hamstring stretch. Sink down, reach the arms out, drop the chest and head toward the floor to open the mid back, then bring the hands in and drive the knees back to stretch the hamstrings. If your calves are tight, keeping the heels down may be difficult at first. Work on it consistently and improve the range over time.

The fifth exercise attacks both hip flexion and hip extension. One leg comes forward as you lean your chest toward the knee, getting into deep hip flexion. Then you shift back and drive the hips forward to open up the hip flexors and psoas on the opposite side. Tight hip flexors can alter your posture, change how your pelvis moves, and make your lower back work harder than it should.

Do five reps of each movement on each side. The whole routine takes about five minutes and can be done every day. You do not need a gym. You do not need equipment. You do not need a complicated stretching program. You just need to stop ignoring the motions your body is already telling you it is losing.

If your hips feel tight, your lower back feels stiff, your squat feels restricted, or you just want to keep moving well as you get older, start here. These five daily mobility exercises help restore hip internal rotation, hip external rotation, hip flexion, hip extension, hamstring mobility, QL flexibility, and thoracic spine rotation in one simple routine.

The mistake most people make is waiting until the stiffness becomes painful. By then, what started as a mobility restriction may already be turning into something more permanent. Do this now, before you lose the motion, before your low back keeps compensating, and before your hips force you to care.

For a complete training program that builds muscle, burns fat, improves mobility, and helps you train like an athlete while protecting your joints, head to https://athleanx.com and choose the ATHLEAN-X program that matches your goals.

Be sure to subscribe to the channel and turn on notifications so you never miss a new video from Jeff Cavaliere and ATHLEAN-X. These five daily mobility exercises help restore hip internal rotation, hip external rotation, hip flexion, hip extension, hamstring mobility, QL flexibility, and thoracic spine rotation in one simple routine.

The mistake most people make is waiting until the stiffness becomes painful. By then, what started as a mobility restriction may already be turning into something more permanent. Do this now, before you lose the motion, before your low back keeps compensating, and before your hips force you to care.

For a complete training program that builds muscle, burns fat, improves mobility, and helps you train like an athlete while protecting your joints, head to https://athleanx.com and choose the ATHLEAN-X program that matches your goals.

Be sure to subscribe to the channel and turn on notifications so you never miss a new video from Jeff Cavaliere and ATHLEAN-X.
videos.summary: Do These 5 Exercises Every Day Before It’s Too Late If you wake up with stiff hips, a tight lower back, or that locked-up feeling that makes you move older than you actually are, this videon is for you. In this five minute bodyweight mobility routine, I'm going to show you five exercises you can do anywhere, with no equipment, to start restoring the hip and lower back motion you lose when you sit too much, train too har.

In this video, I’ll show you a simple iron technique that’s helping amateur golfers strike the ball more like tour pros. You'll learn how to compress your irons, create better contact, and finally get that pure strike you've been chasing.

videos.title: How to start fasting when you need to loose weight
videos.summary_source_text:
How to start fasting when you need to loose weight The approach to fasting is not the same for everyone. The greater the metabolic dysfunction, the more structured and intentional the plan may need to be. Rather than jumping into extended fasts immediately, the body often benefits from a gradual transition that builds metabolic flexibility over time. Lasting change happens when the body adapts step by step, not when it is forced into something it is not ready for.

Want to note that the prolonged fasting I recommend to my patients is always done under supervision.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

videos.title: I Found South Korea's CRAZIEST Golf Shops!
videos.summary_source_text:
I Found South Korea's CRAZIEST Golf Shops! Join Rick as he explores South Korea's incredible golf shopping scene, from towering multi-storey golf stores and exclusive brands to products and experiences you simply can't find anywhere else in the world. Whether you're a golf equipment fanatic or just curious about golf culture abroad, this is a side of the game you've probably never seen before.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.

It's been 9 years since I posted the original McDavid Drive Wide Guide and McDavid is still running the exact same pattern today. Almost nobody else in the NHL has figured out why it works which is exactly what makes it so powerful for the player or coach who actually understands it.

videos.title: Byd siktar på topp 3 i Sverige. Intervju med Sverigechefen Niklas Gustafson.
videos.summary_source_text:
Byd siktar på topp 3 i Sverige. Intervju med Sverigechefen Niklas Gustafson. Betalt samarbete med BYD.
Byd hörde av sig och undrade om jag kunde intervjua deras Sverigechef Niklas Gustafson som ett betalt samarbete. Efter funderande svarade jag ja. Förutsättningen var att jag fick ställa alla frågor jag ville, och att ni tittare fick bidra med frågor. Jag bad också AI om svåra frågor till Niklas.
Inget har censurerats eller tagits bort från intervjun - de vill helt enkelt få mer uppmärksamhet.
Och intervjun var mycket intressant tycker jag. 
Målsättningen är glasklar: Att inom några år bli topp tre i Sverige. Hur det ska gå till? Med Kinesiskt "tänk", Kinesiska ambitioner, Kinesiska arbetstider … Bara bestämma sig och se till att det blir gjort.
Höga mål, höga krav – och förmodligen hög belöning.

Jag ställer alla frågor om Kinesiska stigman som det politiska systemet, arbetsförhållanden och även om teknikutveckling, hur Europeisk industri ska göra för att möta det Kinesiska motståndet. Rostskydd, spindelleder, garantier, bilpassion och … 

Hoppas du tycker att det är intressant

#byd #bydatto2 #bilindustri #denza #flashcharging #BYDsverige #alriksbilar #elbilar #kina 
 #platinumcars #denza #denzaz9gt @PlatinumCars-o6f9j Betalt samarbete med BYD.
Byd hörde av sig och undrade om jag kunde intervjua deras Sverigechef Niklas Gustafson som ett betalt samarbete. Efter funderande svarade jag ja. Förutsättningen var att jag fick ställa alla frågor jag ville, och att ni tittare fick bidra med frågor. Jag bad också AI om svåra frågor till Niklas.
Inget har censurerats eller tagits bort från intervjun - de vill helt enkelt få mer uppmärksamhet.
Och intervjun var mycket intressant tycker jag. 
Målsättningen är glasklar: Att inom några år bli topp tre i Sverige. Hur det ska gå till? Med Kinesiskt "tänk", Kinesiska ambitioner, Kinesiska arbetstider … Bara bestämma sig och se till att det blir gjort.
Höga mål, höga krav – och förmodligen hög belöning.

Jag ställer alla frågor om Kinesiska stigman som det politiska systemet, arbetsförhållanden och även om teknikutveckling, hur Europeisk industri ska göra för att möta det Kinesiska motståndet. Rostskydd, spindelleder, garantier, bilpassion och … 

Hoppas du tycker att det är intressant

videos.title: Round 4 Highlights | 2026 Austrian Alpine Open presented by Kitzbühel Tirol
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 4 Highlights | 2026 Austrian Alpine Open presented by Kitzbühel Tirol Watch the highlights from the final round of the 2026 Austrian Alpine Open presented by Kitzbühel Tirol, where the title was decided in dramatic fashion on the final hole.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The European Swing continues this week as the DP World Tour heads to a new venue for the Austrian Alpine Open presented by Kitzbühel Tirol. Ryder Cup hero Sepp Straka will tee it up on home soil for the first time since 2018, leading a host of Austrian stars looking to delight the home fans. Since that appearance at the Shot Clock Masters, Straka has gone on to become the first Austrian to win on the PGA TOUR, taking his tally of wins on that circuit to four and twice win the Ryder Cup but he is searching for a maiden DP World Tour title. This week we head to a third first-time host in five events as Golfclub Kitzbühel-Schwarzsee-Reith becomes the 465th venue to stage a DP World Tour event. Joining the field this week are players like Casey Jarvis, Kipp Popert and reigning champion Nicolai von Dellingshausen.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

videos.title: Why Pitch Shots Need Different Technique  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Pitch Shots Need Different Technique  #golfswing #golftips Pitch shots require a very different technique compared to a full swing. With less speed needed, distance control comes from changing your stance width and the length of your backswing rather than swinging harder. A shorter, less aggressive downswing allows for better control and more consistent contact. Let the length of the backswing determine the distance and your pitch shots become far easier to manage.

videos.title: Your Tight Muscles Are a Warning — Here's What They're Missing
videos.summary_source_text:
Your Tight Muscles Are a Warning — Here's What They're Missing Constantly dealing with tight traps, muscle tightness, jaw tension, teeth grinding, or eye twitching? Discover the connection between magnesium and calcium, why your muscles stay tight, and how to finally relieve chronic muscle tension naturally.

🌟 10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4u6N5gU

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

0:00 Introduction: Tight traps all the time 
0:24 Calcium and muscle tightness 
1:06 Why muscles stay tight 
3:12 Medications that mimic magnesium
4:01 Calcium and tight traps 
5:38 The circadian rhythm of magnesium
6:40 Magnesium and vitamin K2
8:26 Magnesium and calcium supplements 

Watch next to learn more about other symptoms linked to low magnesium:
▶️ https://youtu.be/2qu59nPJXcg
▶️ https://youtu.be/IwalrYX_7ic
▶️ https://youtu.be/p824XQXWHAg

Calcium does far more than support bone health. About 99% of the calcium in your body is involved in cell signaling and communication, including muscle contraction and maintaining a healthy heartbeat.

When a muscle contracts, calcium enters the muscle cell. For the muscle to relax, calcium must be pushed back out. This process requires ATP. Magnesium is essential for ATP function, making it a key nutrient for proper muscle relaxation.

Palpitations, arrhythmias, muscle tension, headaches, teeth grinding, and eye twitching are common symptoms in people who are low in magnesium.

Calcium channel blockers mimic some of the effects of magnesium, as do certain medications used for Alzheimer’s disease.

Vitamin K2 is important for keeping calcium out of soft tissues and directing it where it belongs, but it also depends on magnesium to function properly. Your body’s pH can also influence how effectively magnesium works.

Instead of focusing on calcium supplements, prioritize magnesium. Magnesium glycinate is one of the most absorbable forms and is often preferred for supporting healthy magnesium levels.

🌟 Which of the 10 health signals are you missing? Take the 2-minute quiz to discover your #1 Health Lever: https://drbrg.co/49SgqnI

In this video, we’ll explain why the more stressed you are, the more magnesium your body actually needs, and how low magnesium levels can trigger symptoms like anxiety, panic attacks, poor sleep, tight muscles, irritability, and the “tired but wired” feeling.

videos.title: Can the Denver Nuggets find a different second star next to Nikola Jokić? | Serbian Corner
videos.summary_source_text:
Can the Denver Nuggets find a different second star next to Nikola Jokić? | Serbian Corner While the NBA audience waits to see whether the OKC Thunder or the San Antonio Spurs will play the New York Knicks in the Finals, Miroslav continues with his post-postseason shows.

In the 192nd episode of the show,  he is joined by Sam Esfandiari of the Light Years Podcast, Iztok Franko of the Digginbasketball substack, and DNVR's own Brendan Vogt to discuss the current state of the Nuggets, Lakers, and Warriors. Topics include:

• What can the Nuggets learn from the 2019 Warriors, who lost the championship and Kevin Durant, but found a way to win another title in 2022?
• What can the Lakers learn from the 2024-2026 Nuggets when it comes to building a team around Luka Dončić?
• Lessons the Nuggets should learn from around the League
• The best path for second and third-tier contenders during the heyday of two young juggernauts in the West
• Expectations versus wishful thinking when it comes to the Nuggets' moves this summer
• Fun (?) trades between the three teams

videos.title: Google Remy, Grok 5, Mythos 1, New Atlas Robot, ASI… and More AI News This Month!
videos.summary_source_text:
Google Remy, Grok 5, Mythos 1, New Atlas Robot, ASI… and More AI News This Month! This month in AI was packed with strange and important updates. Google is testing Remy, a new Gemini agent that many are already calling a possible OpenClaw killer. Elon Musk showed more of Grok 5, Anthropic’s Mythos 1 keeps appearing in cybersecurity traces, DeepSeek cut prices again, and Boston Dynamics upgraded Atlas into a much stronger humanoid robot. But the biggest story may be the rise of AI agents that can work, code, see, adapt, and possibly spread much faster than people expected.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉️ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@space.revolution

0:00 Intro
1:54 Google Remy
12:21 New Atlas Robot
21:22 Unitree G1
25:23 Evolvable AI
40:17 DeepSeek V4
54:12 Claude Mythos Warning
1:10:55 Anthropic Mythos 1
1:25:06 Grok 5
1:41:34 Google Antigravity 2.0
1:54:29 Mythos Situation

🚨 Why It Matters
This is bigger than another normal month of AI news. Google, Elon Musk, DeepSeek, Anthropic, OpenAI, and major robotics companies are all moving toward the same thing: AI systems that do more than answer questions. Remy is pushing Gemini deeper into real work, Antigravity 2.0 is changing coding, Grok 5 could turn xAI into a serious coding player, DeepSeek is making powerful AI cheaper again, and Mythos may be pushing AI agents into cybersecurity. At the same time, humanoid robots like Atlas and Unitree G1 are becoming stronger, more useful, and easier to control.

videos.title: THE CAROLINA HURRICANES ARE HEADING BACK TO THE STANLEY CUP FINAL!!
videos.summary_source_text:
THE CAROLINA HURRICANES ARE HEADING BACK TO THE STANLEY CUP FINAL!! The Carolina Hurricanes are heading back to the Stanley Cup Final for the first time since 2006! They defeated the Montreal Canadiens 6-1 in Game 5 to punch their ticket for the first time in 20 years! What stood out in the win, and what does it mean for the team, franchise, and everyone? On the Eastern Conference Final Saturday Special Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes absolutely DOMINATED the Canadiens again, winning 6-1 en route to their first Stanley Cup Final since 2006. Between the Junkyard Dog line, Frederik Andersen, and a total team effort, the Hurricanes were destined to get over the hump and make it to the ultimate dance. Second and finally, Zach shares his thoughts on what it means not only for the team, but for Hurricanes fans as they will see their team have a chance for their second Stanley Cup in franchise history. What has transpired over the last eight seasons, more so the last 20 years, to get to this point? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

Second and finally, Zach shares his thoughts on what it means not only for the team, but for Hurricanes fans as they will see their team have a chance for their second Stanley Cup in franchise history. What has transpired over the last eight seasons, more so the last 20 years, to get to this point? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Put THIS Under Your Feet Before Bed Tonight | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
Put THIS Under Your Feet Before Bed Tonight | Dr. Mandell Before bed tonight, try something surprisingly simple that may help relax your feet, legs, breathing, and nervous system using nothing more than a frozen water bottle. In this video, Dr. Mandell demonstrates how slowly rolling one bare foot over a frozen bottle for about 90 seconds may help stimulate sensory nerves, release tension in the plantar fascia, improve circulation, and support parasympathetic nervous system activation, the calming “rest and recovery” state your body needs before sleep. Many people are physically exhausted at night, yet their nervous system remains overstimulated from stress, screen time, anxiety, overthinking, poor posture, standing all day, or constant fight or flight activation. This simple before bed technique combines cold stimulation, slow pressure, fascia release, sensory nerve input, and calming breathwork to help the body unwind naturally. One of the most fascinating parts of this technique is comparing one foot to the other before switching sides, because many people immediately notice one side feeling lighter, looser, calmer, cooler, or more relaxed. Watch the full video, try it for yourself tonight, and comment below describing exactly what you felt after doing it. Your experience may help someone else struggling with stress, tension, poor sleep, tight feet, restless legs, or nervous system overload.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: Try This Driver Setup Sequence  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Try This Driver Setup Sequence  #golfswing #golftips This setup drill is perfect if your stance gets too narrow with the driver or you struggle to hit up on the ball. Start with both feet together on the alignment stick, flare the left foot, then step the right foot out farther than feels natural. This creates the wider base you need for a stronger launch angle, better balance, and more consistent contact. A more stable, athletic stance often means more distance without swinging harder.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. This setup drill is perfect if your stance gets too narrow with the driver or you struggle to hit up on the ball. videos.title: Lär hellre barnen om pengar än att ge dem pengar
videos.summary_source_text:
Lär hellre barnen om pengar än att ge dem pengar Det finns en myt att man måste ge sina barn pengar på 18-årsdagen för att vara en bra förälder. Jag tänker tvärtom: det är helt okej att inte ge något, och att ge ekonomisk kompetens är mycket mer värt än själva slanten.

Nästan oavsett hur mycket du ger vid 18 är det smulor jämfört med vad barnet tjänar över livet och med ränta-på-ränta på det de själva sparar. Den vanliga frågan är när barnen är redo att prata pengar. Min erfarenhet är att de nästan alltid är redo, frågan är när vi vuxna är det.

Mer om barn och pengar finns på [rikatillsammans.se](http://rikatillsammans.se) och i RikaTillsammans-podden. Det finns en myt att man måste ge sina barn pengar på 18-årsdagen för att vara en bra förälder.
